notes: SYNTHETIC but RUNNABLE demo dataset. Real .arch specs are evolved through the REAL Arch CLI by `external run` / the external-run-smoke integration test, so outcomes are observed, not declared. It exercises the Phase 2 external-validation plumbing only and is EXCLUDED from every benchmark claim. Real externally authored services, evolutions, authorship/source metadata, and holdout decisions are PENDING - EXTERNAL.

services.title: Demo Social (synthetic, runnable)
services.notes: Synthetic social-feed-shaped service with real, runnable .arch specs.

evolutions.intent: Add a post visibility enum (public/private/followers), defaulted and indexed.
Add a boolean `pinned` flag to Post, defaulted to false.
Remove the `pinned` field from Post (a destructive, data-losing change).
Rename Post.pinned to Post.isPinned (no renamedFrom metadata, so it degrades to drop + add).

unsupportedReason.summary: No renamedFrom metadata, so a rename is seen as drop + add (destructive).
unsupportedReason.detail: Arch cannot tell pinned -> isPinned is a rename, so it plans a destructive removal and refuses to apply.

suggestedNextSteps: add renamedFrom metadata to the grammar/IR
emit a rename migration instead of drop + add
